title: strychnos thorelii
intro: Strychnos thorelii is a species of flowering plant in the family Loganiaceae, commonly known as the Thoreli's tree or Strychnos tree. Traditionally, the plant has been used in medicine for its medicinal properties, which include having analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antimalarial properties. The health benefits of Strychnos thorelii include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating various infections, particularly those caused by parasites and bacteria. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed for medicinal purposes, although it is essential to consult a healthcare professional before using any plant-based remedies.
